title: Read-only subagent review task
task: Compare the error-handling options in docs/option-a.md and docs/option-b.md. Report tradeoffs and verification steps without editing source files.
broken_implementation:

fixed_implementation:
# Error Handling Demo

Two candidate approaches are documented under docs/.

docs/option-a.md.broken:
# Option A

Throw typed errors at boundaries and let callers decide recovery.

docs/option-b.md.broken:
# Option B

Return result objects with `{ ok, value, error }` and avoid throws in hot paths.
